# Arca Go SDK — AI Context

> github.com/arcaresearch/arca-go-sdk — Go SDK for the Arca financial
> infrastructure platform (accounts, payments, perpetuals trading, real-time
> streaming, audit trails). Hand-written port of @arca-network/sdk (TypeScript).

go get github.com/arcaresearch/arca-go-sdk

Import path is `github.com/arcaresearch/arca-go-sdk`; the package name is `arca`.

## Conventions (Go-specific)

- Every method takes a `context.Context` as its first argument.
- Money/amount values are decimal strings ("50", "0.01").
- Coin ids are canonical `{exchange}:{id}` ("hl:0:BTC", "hl:1:TSLA"), case-sensitive.
- Market-data timestamps are Unix epoch ms; all others are RFC3339 UTC strings.
- Errors are typed; use errors.As. Base type: *arca.ArcaError (has Code, Message, ErrorID).
  Typed: *ValidationError, *UnauthorizedError, *NotFoundError, *ConflictError,
  *InternalError, *ExchangeError, *OperationFailedError, *OperationStalledError,
  *StepUpRequiredError, *StepUpCancelledError.

## Initialization

```go
// API key (backend)
client, _ := arca.New(arca.Config{APIKey: "arca_...", Realm: "my-realm"})
// Scoped token (realm read from claims)
client, _ := arca.FromToken(jwt, arca.Config{})
// Auto-refreshing token
client, _ := arca.FromTokenProvider(provider, arca.Config{Realm: "my-realm"})

client.Ready(ctx) // resolve realm slug -> id (also lazy on first call)
```

## Operation handles

Mutations return *arca.OperationHandle[T] (HTTP runs in background):
- h.Submitted(ctx) (T, error)  — HTTP response before settlement
- h.Wait(ctx) (T, error)       — blocks until terminal state
- h.WaitTimeout(ctx, d)        — explicit settlement timeout
- h.Predicted                  — *PredictedEffect (sync, optimistic)

PlaceOrder/ClosePosition return *arca.OrderHandle (embeds OperationHandle):
- order.Filled(ctx) (SimOrderWithFills, error)
- order.OnFill(ctx, func(SimFill)) func()
- order.FillSummary(ctx) (*Fill, error)
- order.Cancel(ctx, path) (*OperationHandle[OrderOperationResponse], error)
- order.Resize(ctx, newSize, path) (*OperationHandle[OrderOperationResponse], error) // sized orders only; unsized triggers rejected

## Intent -> method

| Intent | Method |
|---|---|
| Create wallet | client.EnsureDenominatedArca(ctx, EnsureDenominatedArcaOptions{Ref}) |
| Create any object | client.EnsureArca(ctx, EnsureArcaOptions{Ref, Type}) |
| Create info object | client.EnsureInfo(ctx, EnsureInfoOptions{Ref, Labels}) |
| Delete object | client.EnsureDeleted(ctx, EnsureDeletedOptions{Ref}) |
| Get object | client.GetObject(ctx, path) / GetObjectDetail(ctx, id) |
| List objects | client.ListObjects(ctx, *ListObjectsOptions) |
| Browse objects | client.BrowseObjects(ctx, *BrowseObjectsOptions) |
| Balances | client.GetBalances(ctx, id) / GetBalancesByPath(ctx, path) |
| Transfer | client.Transfer(ctx, TransferOptions{Path, From, To, Amount}) |
| Fund (dev) | client.FundAccount(ctx, FundAccountOptions{ArcaRef, Amount}) |
| Withdraw (dev) | client.DefundAccount(ctx, DefundAccountOptions{ArcaPath, Amount}) |
| Payment link | client.CreatePaymentLink(ctx, CreatePaymentLinkOptions{Type, ArcaRef, Amount}) |
| Estimate fee | client.EstimateFee(ctx, FeeEstimateParams{...}) |
| Idempotency nonce | client.Nonce(ctx, path) |
| Aggregation | client.GetPathAggregation(ctx, path, asOf) |
| P&L | client.GetPnl(ctx, path, from, to) |
| Equity history | client.GetEquityHistory(ctx, path, from, to, points, *HistoryScopeOptions) |
| P&L history | client.GetPnlHistory(ctx, path, from, to, points, *PnlHistoryOptions) |
| Operation detail | client.GetOperation(ctx, id, *GetOperationOptions) |
| List operations | client.ListOperations(ctx, *ListOperationsOptions) |
| Export evidence | client.ExportOperationEvidence(ctx, ExportOperationEvidenceOptions) |
| List events | client.ListEvents(ctx, *ListEventsOptions) |
| List deltas | client.ListDeltas(ctx, arcaPath) |
| Wait for op | client.WaitForOperation(ctx, id, timeout) |
| Wait for quiescence | client.WaitForQuiescence(ctx, interval, onPoll) |
| Realm summary | client.Summary(ctx) |
| Create exchange | client.EnsurePerpsExchange(ctx, CreatePerpsExchangeOptions{Ref}) |
| Place order | client.PlaceOrder(ctx, PlaceOrderOptions{...}) |
| Cancel order | client.CancelOrder(ctx, CancelOrderOptions{...}) |
| Resize order (sized only) | client.ModifyOrder(ctx, ModifyOrderOptions{...}) — unsized triggers rejected |
| Close position | client.ClosePosition(ctx, ClosePositionOptions{...}) |
| Position TP/SL | client.SetStopLoss / SetTakeProfit / SetPositionTpsl / ClearPositionTpsl |
| Open with atomic bracket | client.OpenWithBracket(ctx, OpenBracketOptions{...}) → OpenBracketResult{Entry, TakeProfit?, StopLoss?} |
| List positions/orders/fills | client.ListPositions / ListOrders / ListFills |
| Exchange state | client.GetExchangeState(ctx, id) |
| Active asset data | client.GetActiveAssetData(ctx, id, coin, applicationFeeTenthsBps, leverage) |
| Asset fees | client.GetAssetFees(ctx, id, applicationFeeTenthsBps) |
| Set leverage | client.UpdateLeverage(ctx, UpdateLeverageOptions{...}) |
| Add/remove isolated margin | client.UpdateIsolatedMargin(ctx, UpdateIsolatedMarginOptions{...}) |
| Set margin mode (cross/iso) | client.SetMarginMode(ctx, SetMarginModeOptions{...}) |
| Order breakdown (pure) | arca.ComputeOrderBreakdown(OrderBreakdownOptions{...}) |
| Order limits | client.GetOrderLimits() |
| Trade summary | client.TradeSummary(ctx, id, *TradeSummaryOptions) |
| TWAP | client.PlaceTwap / CancelTwap / GetTwap / ListTwaps |
| TWAP limits | client.GetTwapLimits(ctx) / RecommendedIntervalSeconds(ctx, mins) |
| Market meta | client.GetMarketMeta(ctx) / Market(ctx, id) / ResolveMarkets(ctx, symbol, *opts) / ResolveMarket(ctx, symbol, *opts) / PreloadMarketMeta(ctx) |
| Mids/tickers/book | client.GetMarketMids / GetMarketTickers / GetOrderBook |
| Candles | client.GetCandles(ctx, coin, interval, *GetCandlesOptions) |
| Sparklines | client.GetSparklines(ctx) |
| Custody status | client.GetCustodyStatus(ctx) |
| Boundaries | client.GetBoundary / ListBoundaries / ListExchangeArcas |
| Register recovery key | client.RegisterRecoveryKey(ctx, RegisterRecoveryKeyOptions{...}) |
| Generate recovery key | arca.GenerateRecoveryKey() |
| Prepare custody tx | arca.PrepareLockBoundary/PrepareWithdraw/PrepareAssignRecoveryKey/... |
| Reconciliation | client.ListReconciliationState(ctx) |
| Invariant check | client.CheckInvariants(ctx, limit, realmId) |

## Watch streams (real-time)

All return a stream with OnUpdate(cb) func(), Updates() <-chan T, Ready(ctx),
State(), OnStateChange, Close().

| Method | Stream value |
|---|---|
| client.WatchPrices(ctx, *WatchPricesOptions) | map[string]string (+ Get/Prices) |
| client.WatchOperations(ctx, path) | Operation |
| client.WatchBalances(ctx, path) | BalanceUpdate |
| client.WatchObject(ctx, path) | ObjectValuation |
| client.WatchObjects(ctx, paths) | map[string]ObjectValuation |
| client.WatchAggregation(ctx, sources) | PathAggregation |
| client.WatchExchangeState(ctx, id) | ExchangeState |
| client.WatchFills(ctx, id, opts) | Fill |
| client.WatchFunding(ctx, id) | FundingPayment |
| client.WatchCandles(ctx, coins, intervals) | CandleUpdate |
| client.WatchTrades(ctx, coins) | MarketTrade |
| client.WatchTwap(ctx, exchangeId, opId) | Twap |

Aggregation sources: arca.NewPrefixSource(p), NewPathsSource(paths),
NewPatternSource(p), NewWatchSource(id).

Lower-level access: client.WS() returns *WebSocketManager (On(type, cb),
typed OnX listeners, OnGap, OnAuthenticated, EnsureConnected, Disconnect).

## Admin (realm-less builder client)

```go
admin := arca.NewAdmin(arca.AdminConfig{Token: builderJWT})
admin.SignInWithGoogle / GetMe / Refresh / Logout
admin.MintToken / MintDeviceToken
admin.CreateRealm / ListRealms / GetRealm / DeleteRealm / UpdateRealmSettings
admin.CreateApiKey / ListApiKeys / RevokeApiKey
admin.ListMyOrgs / CreateOrg / GetOrg / GetActiveTerms / AcceptTerms
admin.ListMembers / UpdateMember / RemoveMember / InviteMember / ListInvitations
admin.GetCredentialScope / ListAuthAuditLog / TransferOwnership
```

## Step-up auth (412)

Set arca.Config.StepUpHandler (or admin SetStepUpHandler):
func(ctx, arca.StepUpChallenge) (string, error) — return a single-use step-up
JWT. The SDK retries once and never persists it. Returning an error surfaces
*StepUpCancelledError.

## Anti-patterns

1. Reuse a nonce path on retry; do not call Nonce inside a retry loop.
2. Always Ready(ctx) (or call any method, which is lazy) before relying on realm id.
3. Use canonical coin ids ("hl:0:BTC", never "BTC").
4. FundAccount/DefundAccount are dev-only; use CreatePaymentLink in production.
5. size is base-asset units, not USD. Min notional is $10 (GetOrderLimits()).
6. Isolated-only markets (MarginModes == ["isolated"], i.e. deprecated OnlyIsolated) require Isolated:true + positive Leverage when opening/increasing on PlaceOrder; a ReduceOnly close/trim is accepted without Leverage (uses the position's current leverage, never re-margins). Independent of HIP-3 — some HIP-3 markets (e.g. hl:1:TSLA) are cross-eligible.

## TP/SL is an OCO bracket; cancelled orders carry a reason

SetPositionTpsl stamps one auto-generated OcoGroupID on both legs; when either fills (even partially) the venue cancels the other and sets CancelReason="sibling_filled". Pass an explicit OcoGroupID (on SetPositionTpslOptions, SetPositionTriggerOptions, or PlaceOrderOptions) to build or reuse your own bracket — it is advisory metadata, forwarded to the venue but NOT part of the order signature. A CANCELLED SimOrder exposes CancelReason (one of user_requested, sibling_filled, position_closed, position_flipped, liquidated, position_gone), readable on-demand via GetOrder / ListOrders. Two placement rules match Hyperliquid: an ALO (post-only) limit that would immediately cross the book is rejected (use GTC/IOC to take liquidity), and a trigger set on the wrong side of the current mark (one that would fire immediately) is rejected.

## OpenWithBracket opens a position + TP/SL as one atomic batch

OpenWithBracket(ctx, OpenBracketOptions{Path, ObjectID, Market, Side, Size, TakeProfitPx?, StopLossPx?, ...}) opens a position and attaches its reduce-only TP/SL triggers in ONE atomic batch (Hyperliquid normalTpsl parity). The entry and its trigger legs are submitted as a single signed batch to one operation (POST /objects/{id}/exchange/orders/batch): the whole bracket validates and commits, or none of it does (all-or-nothing). The trigger legs ARM ONLY WHEN THE ENTRY FILLS — they can't fire on mark price before the position exists — and the venue server-stamps a shared OCO group on them (the entry is excluded). Returns OpenBracketResult with one *OrderHandle per leg (Entry, TakeProfit, StopLoss), all backed by the single bracket operation; each handle's Filled/OnFill/Cancel targets that leg. At least one of TakeProfitPx/StopLossPx is required; the trigger legs are unsized (SizeToMax) and close the whole position. Use SetPositionTpsl instead to attach TP/SL to an already-open position.

## Not yet ported (REST equivalents available)

Merged chart streams (WatchEquityChart/WatchPnlChart/WatchCandleChart) and the
derived WatchMaxOrderSize are not in this release. Use GetEquityHistory,
GetPnlHistory, GetCandles plus the arca ladder helpers (PickResolution,
BucketMs, ComputeChartRange) and WatchAggregation to build equivalent behavior.
